tnt2nexus

tnt2nexus.Rd

Converts a TNT matrix into NEXUS format while preserving header data type and ordered character structures.

Usage

tnt2nexus(input_file, output_file)

Arguments

input_file

Path to the input TNT file.

output_file

Path to the output NEXUS file.

Author

Daniel YM Nakamura

On this page

Developed by Daniel Y. M. Nakamura.
